items.title: FIFA World Cup | Ecuador vs Germany LIVE updates: Group E match gets underway
items.summary: The four-time world champions take on an Ecuador side who desperately need a victory to extend their stay in the competition
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Man City agree record fee with Forest for Anderson
items.summary: Manchester City agree a deal with Nottingham Forest worth up to a British record £130m to sign England midfielder Elliot Anderson.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Saracens confirm 'no further action' against academy player after nightclub incident
items.summary: Totoa Auvaa had been accused by ECB of 'unprovoked attacks' on Gus Atkinson, but club stands by player
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
